full_text:
R1: Phase | Risk | Probability (1-5) | Impact (1-5) | Mitigation strategies | Potential impact | Responsible
R2: All | Miscommunication | 3.0 | 4.0 | Active slack use
Refer to experiments by their specific name (eg Expansion)
Always leave some notes when working with blocks/slides
Daily, precise documentation sharing | Wrong use of material,
storage, resources etc | All
R3: Planning | Lack of antibodies or other reagents | 4.0 | 5.0 | Order antibodies, planning in advance
Check availability in advance
Adjust experimental plan if reagents do not arrive on time | Experiment performance | Saun
R4: Experimental | We need more ab than what we have | 4.0 | 2.0 | Check in advance the antibodies that we can dillute more | Lower signal | Saun-Ada
R5: Experimental | Old and sensitive slides | 3.0 | 4.0 | - These will be marked with a star
- Handle more carefully with the bleaching solution
- Resection blocks if it does not work | - Tissue detachment
- Might have altered signal, check | Ada
R6: Experimental | Tissue detachment | 3.0 | 4.0 | . If >5 tissues begin detaching notify ada and make plan
- If >10 tissues are detaching directly place spacers
Otherwise, no spacers in cycles 1-2
- If detachment occurs in cycle >2, place spacers in ALL | Loss of tissue | Saun
R7: Experimental | Antibodies do not work | 3.0 | 3.0 | -Discuss in slack channel and take a decision:

detachment occurs in cycle >2, place spacers in ALL | Loss of tissue | Saun
R7: Experimental | Antibodies do not work | 3.0 | 3.0 | -Discuss in slack channel and take a decision:
- Dropping from analysis and following experiment
- Repeating that cycle | Loss of data | Nika
R8: Experimental | Too many slides | 5.0 | 3.0 | - Ada will make a guide of when to re-scan and when not to 
- Make a plan and divide in batches
- We use gray boxes for 
- Check the up/down slides and relabel sticker
- Standard naming, ordered scanning practices | Mistakes in experiments | Nika, Saun
R9: Experimental/Analysis | Data loss (hard-drive/computer) | 2.0 | 5.0 | Daily backups - data MUST be in at least two places | Experiment termination | Nika
R10: Analysis | No computational resources | 2.0 | 3.0 | Book workstations in advance | Delays in analysis | Nika
R11: Analysis | No storage space left | 3.0 | 4.0 | Check in advance | Delays in analysis | Ada
R12: Analysis | Code loss | 2.0 | 3.0 | Update all code in github | Spending time coding the same thing | Ada, Nika, Sara
